nodes.label: जैसा सवाल वैसा जवाब
nodes.description: Chapter 2 - A clever story about wit and humor from Rimjhim textbook

nodes.label: कहानी परिचय (Story Introduction)
nodes.description: Overview of the humorous story about clever questions and answers

nodes.label: विषय: चतुराई और हास्य
nodes.description: The story's subject is cleverness, wit, and humor

nodes.label: मुख्य पात्र (Main Characters)
nodes.description: The key characters including the clever protagonist

nodes.label: संदेश: बुद्धि बल से बड़ी
nodes.description: Message: Intelligence is greater than physical strength

nodes.label: सवाल-जवाब शैली (Q&A Style)
nodes.description: The story uses a question-and-answer format to create humor

nodes.label: मुश्किल सवाल (Difficult Questions)
nodes.description: Tricky and challenging questions asked to test the protagonist

nodes.label: चतुर जवाब (Clever Answers)
nodes.description: Witty and unexpected answers that create humor

nodes.label: हास्य (Humor)
nodes.description: Comedy arising from unexpected and clever responses

nodes.label: भाषा कौशल (Language Skills)
nodes.description: Vocabulary, idioms, and language concepts from the chapter

nodes.label: मुहावरे और कहावतें
nodes.description: Idioms and proverbs used in the story like 'जैसे को तैसा'

nodes.label: संवाद लेखन (Dialogue Writing)
nodes.description: Learning to write conversations and dialogues in Hindi

nodes.label: शब्दार्थ (Vocabulary)
nodes.description: Key vocabulary words and their meanings from the story

nodes.label: जीवन की सीख (Life Lessons)
nodes.description: The story teaches that intelligence, calm thinking, and wit are valuable
